overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a spring forest with cherry blossoms. The character passes a small roadside shrine and continues into denser woodland under stormy overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: cherry blossom grove with winding dirt path

events.description: wooden shrine with yellow offerings becomes visible along the path ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path surrounded by blooming cherry blossom trees under dark storm clouds

entered.detail: numerous cherry trees with pink and white blossoms lining both sides of the path
winding dirt trail covered with fallen white petals
small wooden shrine structure with yellow cloth offerings tied to it

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide cherry blossom grove with a dirt path winding through it. The samurai character walks forward as the camera follows from behind, approaching a small wooden shrine post with offerings. Dark storm clouds fill the sky above the blooming trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between cherry grove and dense forest

events.description: passing the wooden shrine and transitioning from cherry blossom grove to denser green forest

agents.ego_description: moving past the shrine and continuing into thicker woodland with mixed tree types and denser undergrowth

entered.detail: tall green deciduous trees with dense foliage replacing the cherry blossoms
clusters of green ferns growing thickly along the forest floor
large decaying log covered in moss lying across the grass

segments.scene_description: The character passes the wooden shrine and leaves the cherry blossom grove behind, entering a denser forest with green deciduous trees. The ground transitions from dirt path to grassy forest floor with patches of ferns. A fallen log appears in the center of the frame as the tree canopy begins to obscure the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest interior with thick undergrowth

agents.ego_description: walking through deep forest with tall ferns and dense tree cover, moving away from the cherry blossom area

entered.detail: thick overhead tree cover creating a shaded, enclosed environment
tall green fern plants reaching up from the forest floor

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character moving deeper into the forest where the vegetation becomes lush and dense. The path has disappeared into tall grass and ferns. The canopy overhead creates a shaded environment with only glimpses of the stormy sky visible through the thick green foliage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright cherry blossom grove into the depths of a dense, shaded forest under a gathering storm. It begins with the camera trailing a samurai along a winding dirt path through blooming cherry trees, approaching a small wooden shrine post with offerings. As the character passes the shrine, the scene shifts from the pink blossoms into a thicker woodland of green deciduous trees, where the dirt path gives way to a grassy floor dotted with ferns and fallen logs. The camera then moves deeper into the lush vegetation as the tree canopy closes in, obscuring the dark storm clouds above. Finally, the environment transforms into a heavily shaded woodland where the path disappears entirely into tall grass and thick green foliage.
